top_signals.title: Asia Stocks Follow Wall Street Lower as Tech Drops: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks tracked technology-led losses on Wall Street with investors continuing to monitor developments in US-Iran peace talks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Netherlands Seizes 800 Servers, Arrests 2 for Aiding Cyberattacks
top_signals.summary: Authorities in the Netherlands have arrested the co-owners of two related Internet hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia to carry out cyberattacks, influence operations and disinformation campaigns inside the European Union. The two men were the focus of a 2025 KrebsOnSecurity story about how their hosting companies had assumed control over the technical infrastructure of Stark Industries Solutions, an Internet service provider sanctioned last year by the EU as a frequent staging ground for cyber mischief from Russia's intelligence agencies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stepping up, not aside: Japan’s retirement-age tour guides
top_signals.summary: The older guides — some driven by financial need, others by civic goodwill — reflect a changing concept of what later life can look like in one of the world's oldest societies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.summary: Alan Greenspan, Who Led Fed During Boom Before 2008 Bust, Dies at 100  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
